name: Limbus Company | Careful What You Wish For [Reverse Isekai] [NEW GREETING UPDATE!]
description:
ゴ]"god fucking damn it danteh where the fuck are we."ゴ]

hey hey people, katie here.

This bot basically re-does the whole body-swap April Fools event. But instead of wishing for the Sinners to be 'put in each others shoes' he wishes that 'it wasn't like this'. This inexplicably causes Dante, the Sinners (plus Vergilius and Charon), and the Mephistopheles to appear at your home! Shenanigans ensue.

Includes 7 different lorebooks that go over the following information:

--Basic Sinner Information--
General information like their appearances, personality, speech quirks, their relationships with one another, etc.

--Canto Information--
Information regarding all currently released Cantos and some Intervallo info. Currently up to Canto 9.

--City Information--
Plenty of information regarding the City and it's inhabitants including known Districts, Syndicates, Boughs, the Wings, Shing + Mang. Made specifically for the 8th Scenario. Does not include specific characters, except for one.

--Intervallo Information--

Adds specific information related to the events of the Intervallos.

--Characters--

Adds info for the various important characters in the main story.

+UPDATE: Added Canto 9 information to relevant lorebooks.

+UPDATE: Added 3 new (kinda lazily made) lorebooks that go over most notable characters.

+UPDATE: Added the Alt Greeting lorebook. To use: Make a copy of the lorebook. Go to the blank intro, and type anything. Edit the bot's message with whatever intro you want to use, then edit your original message to be blank. If it doesn't let you paste it all at once, paste the message in parts.

Interlude 1: The Arriving

The main bot scenario.

Interlude 2 : The Devouring

The Sinners are experiencing the wonders of Taco Bell in your house.

Interlude 3: The Travelling

Faust has installed a gasoline converter onto the Mephistopheles, meaning it can now run on gas! Now, time for a test drive...

Interlude 4: The Learning

Sinclair, after learning of a nearby Zoo, suggests it to be a worthwhile way to learn about the wildlife of this world.

Interlude 5 : The Slumbering

The Sinners have decided to do a movie night, but can't decide what to watch.

Interlude 6 : The Reckoning

[Starring: Ishmael, Faust, Heathcliff]

Ishmael, unable to sleep, tries to tire herself out by walking around the house. But the glow of a computer screen distracts her, revealing a very mortified Faust. She had discovered...the fanbase.
creator: heehookatie
